name: @elvatis/conduit-bridge
description: Standalone OpenAI-compatible AI proxy: Grok, Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT via headless browser

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/index.js --format=esm --platform=node --packages=external --sourcemap && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/cli.js --format=esm --platform=node --packages=external --sourcemap && node -e "try{require('fs').chmodSync('dist/cli.js',0o755)}catch{}"
